vulnerabilities.description: Lack of Input Sanitization in DTO Mapping
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input sanitization to ensure that data transformation in functions like `mapUserToDto` do not inadvertently allow malicious input to propagate. Use libraries such as DOMPurify for client-side sanitization if data is originally ingested from the user forms.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing JWT/OAuth2 Setup and RBAC/ABAC Middleware Check
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure JWT tokens are implemented with appropriate secret handling and expiry configurations. Include middleware to check permissions (RBAC/ABAC) to validate user access for specific resources. Implement security best practices for stateful sessions if necessary.
